CustomField.formula:
IF(Utility_Calculator_Data_Check__c <> "Good", "Resolve the Utility Calculator Data Check",
HYPERLINK("https://cgph.my.salesforce.com/flow/Utility_Calculation?Property_ID=" & Id &
"&Debug=Not%20Enabled" &
"&Property_Name=" & SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(Name,",","%2C")," ","%20"),"-","%2D"),"#","%23") &
IF(INCLUDES(Development_address__r.Utilities_Included__c, "Heat")=TRUE, "&Add_Heat=No", "&Add_Heat=Yes") & IF(INCLUDES(Development_address__r.Utilities_Included__c, "Cooking")=TRUE, "&Add_Cooking=No", "&Add_Cooking=Yes") &
IF(INCLUDES(Development_address__r.Utilities_Included__c, "Air Conditioning")=TRUE, "&Add_Air_Conditioning=No", "&Add_Air_Conditioning=Yes") &
IF(INCLUDES(Development_address__r.Utilities_Included__c, "Electricity")=TRUE, "&Add_Electricity=No", "&Add_Electricity=Yes") & IF(INCLUDES(Development_address__r.Utilities_Included__c, "Water Heat")=TRUE, "&Add_Water_Heat=No", "&Add_Water_Heat=Yes") & IF(INCLUDES(Development_address__r.Utilities_Included__c, "Water")=TRUE, "&Add_Water=No", "&Add_Water=Yes") & IF(INCLUDES(Development_address__r.Utilities_Included__c, "Sewer")=TRUE, "&Add_Sewer=No", "&Add_Sewer=Yes") & IF(INCLUDES(Development_address__r.Utilities_Included__c, "Trash")=TRUE, "&Add_Trash=No", "&Add_Trash=Yes") &
"&Number_Of_Bedrooms=" & TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c) &
"&Utility_Year=" & Development_address__r.Utility_Year__c & "&Building_Type=" & TEXT(Development_address__r.Bldg_Type_for_Utilities__c) &
"&Heat_Type=" & TEXT(Development_address__r.HOMEtracker__Heating__c) & "&Cooking_Type=" & TEXT(Development_address__r.Stove_Type__c) & "&Water_Heat_Type=" & TEXT(Development_address__r.Water_Heater_Type__c) &
"&retURL=https://cgph.my.salesforce.com/" & Id
, "Calculate Utilities - Will Overwrite the Utilities Field", "_parent"))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Click to calculate the total utilities for this unit. Make sure to save a pdf of the results and attach to the property.
CustomField.label: Calculate Utilities
